snippets.comment: Took a 6 week Calc 2 course with Professor Iwama. He was really caring and always offered to help us whether it was with homework or a test review. He had quizzes and exams that were pretty tough so you will need to study a lot, however I enjoyed his lectures and explanations in the class :)
Do not take this class during the summer. It is too much information for such a small amount of time to learn.

Laid back. Thankfully, he doesn't make quizzes/exams ridiculously hard like other professors, all he asks is for you to turn on your camera and to not cheat. He's really clear while lecturing and really organized since this class was online over the summer! He meets w/students regularly and doesn't

Professor Iwama is the best math teacher I've had in my life. He made calculus so easy and fun to do that I actually thought of changing my major to maths. He's so chill and will be accessible to you outside the class and help you in every way possible. His lectures are so amazing and easy to unders

Jason was one of the best math teachers I've taken. He is very clear on tests and is also willing to have extra meeting sessions if you need it if it isn't his normal office hours. Professor Iwama is a really chill teacher. He expects his student to get into groups for classwork and wants you to succeed in his class. Hes only a part time teacher at Fullerton so he doesnt have office hours, but he is willing to set an appointment with students in the library. I would definitely
